programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Freddie Jackson�s soulful ballads are the stuff of velvet sheets, intimate encounters and rose petaled Jacuzzis. With nine number one hits, including �Rock Me Tonight (For Old Times Sake)� and �You Are My Lady�, Freddie gave voice to sentiments men often struggled to communicate, and women longed to hear. But super-stardom wasn�t all strawberries and whipped cream. Struggling with his weight since childhood, Freddie found his persona at odds with his ballooning figure, while whispers questioning his sexuality swirled amongst fans. In this revealing episode of �Unsung�, Freddie and his closest collaborators, including Melba Moore and M�lissa Morgan, chart his popular success and his personal struggles.

Struggling with his weight since childhood, Freddie found his persona at odds with his ballooning figure, while whispers questioning his sexuality swirled amongst fans. Through the 1980s, Freddie helped catapult the Hush productions sound to the R&B forefront - but when the hits ran out, he found himself facing financial ruin. In this revealing episode of �Unsung�, Freddie and his closest collaborators, including Melba Moore and M�lissa Morgan, chart his popular success and his personal struggles.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Led by the �Father of the Falsetto,� Bobby DeBarge, Switch paved the way for the hit-making DeBarge family with soulful, sensual ballads. But addictions and egos brought their brotherhood to a bitter end.

programme.title: The Bobby Debarge Story

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: Sister Bernice is convinced she sees the face of Jesus in her macaroni and cheese. Brandon tries to seduce a professor when he's failing her class and he hears she gives good grades for sex.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: When Lil’ Daryl goes missing the family organizes a search. Maurice hosts a Joe Willie concert.

programme.title: Rickey Smiley For Real
programme.desc: Rickey makes a big announcement at the Magic City Classic; Da Brat and Gary's flight; Maria Taylor visits Rickey in Atlanta.

programme.title: Rickey Smiley For Real
programme.desc: With the boys all in trouble for various reasons, Rickey takes his boat out for a quick getaway to Bimini for himself and the girls.

programme.title: We're The Campbells
programme.desc: Warryn and Erica get in the studio to record a duet for the first time ever. Joi heads to Atlanta to perform on the PJ Morton Tour. Erica's switches up her plans for a room makeover when Krista and Zaya are ungrateful.

programme.title: The Manns
programme.desc: Frustrated with the handling of the family business, David Sr calls on an outsider to come in and shake things up. David Sr is faced with his own mortality, and his grandkids put on a talent show to see who will carry on the legacy.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Grammy Award winning artist Lil Wayne is uncensored in a special sit down interview with Missy Elliott to talk about growing up in New Orleans, signing his first record deal as a child, and starting his own Young Money Entertainment record label.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Singer Raz B was a teen heartthrob as a member of the platinum selling boy band B2K. He is uncensored as he reflects on his rise to fame, struggles with the music industry and getting the group back together once again.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Six-time Grammy Award winning gospel artist BeBe Winans is one of the industry’s first true crossover artists. He’s best known for his work as a gospel duo with his sister, buthis talents are seen across genres in music and on screen.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Grammy Award winning producer and rapper Swizz Beatz has been known for his music since he was a child. He was just a teenager when he began producing hitrecords for the Ruff Ryders music label, including Eve, The Lox, and his close friend DMX.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: It seems every time Danny finds a project for the shop, he winds up keeping it.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The massive auto extravaganza known as SEMA is rolling into Las Vegas, and this time Danny will be ready.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: "Engine Whisperer" Doc has a cool '67 Firebird he's been working on. While he's a mechanical maestro under the hood, his paint skills are lacking so he enlists Ryan.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny tries to get the derailed '62 Caddy project back on track, while Ryan tries to make amends for a mishap by finding a flip or two for the shop.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has a customer all lined up to buy his 1967 Ford Bronco he's restoring, but Ryan's mistake has set the project way back.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny acquires a '74 Ford F100 he can't wait to trick out and flip for a big profit. But after The Count falls in love with the truck and decides he wants to keep it.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin and Roli make an unplanned stop to check out a mysteriously small vehicle. And later, Danny gets a call from Rob Zombie who wants to customize a truck for his upcoming tour.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Representatives from Sailor Jerry enlist the shop's help to build a bike to commemorate the late artist's iconic style and to auction off at an upcoming charity fundraiser.

programme.desc: Danny and the boys give away a perfect hot rod at the annual Rockabilly Reunion at Lake Havasu. Later, a lady biker stuns the boys.

programme.desc: Danny must do a full bumper-to-bumper restoration on a '66 Mustang convertible, but after stripping it down, he finds very little car between her bumpers; Danny must to decide between asking for more money or losing a bunch of his own.

programme.desc: Danny lets painter Ryan take the lead on a 1959 Chevy Panel Truck project he hopes to flip, and later motivates his crew to clean up the shop.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga still doesn't have his jet boat, but fortunately he has his trusty assistant Davi; the Papac crew is struggling to remain atop the King of the Mountain leaderboard, they're moving to the toughest section on their site.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby gets his jetboat back, and it now has a new engine that will help him get the job done; Rygaard is still struggling and Gabe is forced to promote his inexperienced crew, which could mean disaster.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The battle for King of The Mountain roars on; the Rygaard crew has an issue with getting the wood to the mill; Papac has to negotiate a dangerous unpredictable downhill site and mother nature isn't helping make it any easier.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The race for logs gets hot as Papac go into their most daunting site yet; at Rygaard, the crew tries to string a road over a steep draw using a device called a knife.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In the Louisiana Bayou, Shelby Stanga's jet boat is in serious need of repair; in Washington, Gabe takes a risk and hires a wild card veteran logger; in Alaska, the Papac team is battling the elements mother nature is throwing their way.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga attempts to upgrade his logging empire, so he tries out some new equipment; DJ Jeremiah just may provide the spark the Rygaard has been missing; Triack's production is slowing down because of steep terrain and narrow logging roads.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Rygaard logging has started to claw its way back up the log count thanks to DJ Jeremiah, but today he's a no show; In Alaska they need to fill the seat in the yarder soon; Shelby Stanga is still without his Jetboat.

programme.desc: A devastating injury at Rygaard rattles the crew and threatens to stop production; Shelby's jet boat is back and it's time to go hunting; Triack is under pressure to finish their site before their permit expires.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: After last weeks accident, Gabe Rygaard makes a call to save production and gets his crew back; the Papac crew is taking a thrashing on their last site; the Zitterkopf crew fights to finish their site before the cold weather rolls in.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby realizes he may be short on wood for his log buyer, so he sends his troops out to hunt for some last minute logs; Zitterkopf and Sons lose their skidder a mechanical breakdown.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In Alaska, the team gains a boost of energy as they get two valuable hands on the landing to up production; Gabe Rygaard has his old crew back in full force, but suffer another mechanical breakdown.

programme.desc: Papac is finishing up the roughest most dangerous section of their site; Rygaard logging has fought hard to stay in the race, but a faulty carriage could derail their hopes; Dreadknots resurrected Logzilla to double production.

programme.desc: Shelby's client needs good quality logs to build high-end furniture that will raise money for a local charity; to find the right logs they must go deeper and deeper into the gator-infested wilderness.

programme.desc: Rick looks at an 1800s first edition book about the Underground Railroad; a complete set of baseball cards given only to troops during Desert Shield is brought in; Chumlee tries to come up with his own collectible.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: An early addition of P.T. Barnum's autobiography; a 1966 Dodge Charger with a Hemi engine; a Napoleonic-era Imperial Guard sword.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A first edition of "The Adventures of Bob Hope" comic; an ancient Egyptian mummy mask; a 1950s Disney fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A 44 B.C. Roman coin with Julius Caesar's portrait comes into the shop; a rare 1960s leather jacket; a plaster cast of Joe DiMaggio's feet.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A 1930s Gottlieb grip tester comes into the shop; a limited edition piece of abstract art by Hollywood actor, Anthony Quinn; Chum tries to help promote the shop by trying to make images of the Old Man go viral.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A cast-signed helmet from the TV series "Lost in Space;" a pair of sneakers signed by retired NBA player Robert Parish; a mystery object that cause Rick and Corey to scratch their heads.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The book "The Big Bonanza" comes into the shop; an ancient Tibetan door comes in; the guys decide to find out who's the better driver when Corey gets a ticket.

programme.desc: A hat worn by musician Prince; an Egyptian scarab ring; a WWII-era head-shaped grass planter.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A first edition of "The Adventures of Bob Hope" comic; an ancient Egyptian mummy mask; a 1950s Disney fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A 44 B.C. Roman coin with Julius Caesar's portrait comes into the shop; a rare 1960s leather jacket; a plaster cast of Joe DiMaggio's feet.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A 1930s Gottlieb grip tester comes into the shop; a limited edition piece of abstract art by Hollywood actor, Anthony Quinn; Chum tries to help promote the shop by trying to make images of the Old Man go viral.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After blowing up one of Phil's dangerously antiquated duck blinds, the Robertson boys hatch a wild plan to build a luxury duck blind in the sky. Meanwhile, Ms. Kay and the Robertson women hold a yard sale.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase feels being COO of Duck Commander entitles him to a new office. But when Willie refuses, Jase hatches a plan to build one anyhow. Willie takes Miss Kay and the grandkids to the petting zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: It's duck blind maintenance time again and the boys have discovered the waterline is low. At the levee, they realize this is the work of Phil's bucktoothed arch nemesis...THE BEAVER.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: It's the 40-year anniversary of Duck Commander and this celebration is a redneck Robertson style shindig. To top off the event, Willie decides to construct the world's largest duck call to be revealed at the party.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: To prove once and for all who rules the river AND the boardroom, Willie and Jase revive their childhood rivalry and go head-to-head in a fishing competition with the added challenge of having to sell their catch.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: While out duck hunting, Willie, Jase, and Uncle Si stumble across what redneck's consider nature's most prized succulent treasure--a beehive dripping with wild honey.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A compilation of the best scenes from all 11 seasons of A&E's hit series Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie finds out that his daughter Sadie has a new boyfriend, he wants to get to know him, while instilling some fatherly fear--Robertson style.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie decides to expand the Duck Commander brand into the winemaking industry and buys a vineyard...sight unseen.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase volunteers to take the Duck Commander RV out on pick up, but neglects to mention to Willie, he's taking Si, Martin and Jep along for a road trip.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Si embark on a turkey hunt for the annual Robertson men vs. Robertson women cook-off to create a feast of fresh wild game. With Phil's discerning palate as judge, the teams pull out all of the stops.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When a big business decision must be made affecting Duck Commander, Willie plans an employee retreat.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck for the Duckmen when an old high school nemesis challenges them to a good old fashion race... at the local lawn mower competition. But Willie and the guys soon find out that this sport is nothing short of high octane.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With Sadie's (Willie's daughter) driver's license test fast approaching, she finds herself in dire need of lessons.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After Willie's son (John Luke) leaves Willie's pickup in the driveway with a bone-dry gas tank, Willie and Korie decide that it's time to get the kid his own car.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Duck Commander assembly room gets an unexpected shakeup when a disgruntled Si decides to quit his job. But when Willie hires a replacement that clashes with the duck call room, Jase and the guys quickly become equally miserable at work. Meanwhile, Si turns to Phil for work out on the land turning a routine levee repair into a complete disaster.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie finds his office in shambles and alerts the authorities that the warehouse has had a break in. But soon Willie discovers that the culprit was his brother Jase, who needed supplies for an early morning frog hunt.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When a heat wave envelops West Monroe the air conditioning unit at the Duck Commander warehouse goes down, turning the duck call assembly room into a boiling sweatshop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After Korie decides the junk piles in the Duck Commander warehouse are beginning to reach critical mass, she calls on Willie and the guys to do a little company spring-cleaning. But the discovery of an old Ping-Pong table deep within the clutter quickly turns the chore into an all day table tennis tournament. Meanwhile, Uncle Si realizes that he's many years overdue for an appointment with the local eye doctor and ventures out for some new glasses.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie sees an opportunity to host a show of his own. When the station gives him the opportunity, Willie makes the mistake of bringing Uncle Si on the air with him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Jase, Si and the guys from the duck call room take a field trip to a brand new local donut shop and quickly find out who amongst them can eat the most delicious treats.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie receives a special gift from a Japanese business associate - a "priceless" samurai sword, which Willie keeps out of the hands of Jase and the guys.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver. But too much enthusiasm about the celebrity's mode of transportation turns into a drag race showdown between Willie and Clint. Phil and Si have their hands full fixing Ms. Kay's barbecue when a trip to the outdoor grill store turns disastrous.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: It's Willie's turn to play Santa Claus at the local church this year but Uncle Si crashes the party and the event goes south in a hurry. Meanwhile, the family gathers at Phil and Miss Kay's house to celebrate the holidays in true redneck fashion.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before... including Willie.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realizes that he could stand to lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.desc: With Willie out-of-town, the guys decide to flake off work and leave to brush up the duck blinds on the Robertson land. While out, Si believes he spots what he thinks is the infamous "Black Panther,"

programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too "city."

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh and Eric are neck-in-neck in their race to claim dominance over the ice road, but with only days before the end of the season.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Day 1 of the new Ice Road season begins. There are 6,000 loads of freight to move in just 12 weeks to the oil camps of Alaska's North Slope.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On Alaska's North Slope, a new ice road season has just begun. Carlile Transportation has less than three months to haul 2,000 loads from Fairbanks to Deadhorse.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's three weeks into the winter season in Northern Alaska, and Carlile Transportation has only moved 500 of the 2,000 loads it needs to transport to the Prudhoe Bay oil fields.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With the sun beating down on the ice, the road is melting at an accelerating rate.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Rising temperatures are melting away the ice road, making it a dash to the finish line for the crew breaking down the Langely site.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Warming temperatures are causing overflows all over the ice road, and with water rushing through cracks in the ice, hauling loads just got a lot more dangerous.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: A massive storm blows in and all traffic on the ice road comes to a standstill. And if wheels aren't turning, no one's earning. George, Tim and Lisa take shelter at Coldfoot.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Another winter storm drops nearly a foot of fresh, new snow, obscuring the road south.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly auditions to be the first woman to break into the elite Heavy Haul division by commanding a convoy of pilot cars while hauling 80-foot sections of wide-gauge pipe.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The race is on to make it to Prudhoe before a wicked storm turns fierce.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: A deadly combination of unpredictable weather on the North Slope has made Atigun Pass more dangerous than ever.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With just three weeks to go, everyone is pushing it to the limit to get the freight to Deadhorse before the season ends. Lisa rushes to Carlile to pick up her next load.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: There's only two weeks left to pull in the big bucks and get all the loads to the oil fields.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel. But sometimes the defendant is a threat to the community and the cosigner asks the bondsman for protection.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: So what does a bondsman do when he learns that the felon he's bonded out is booked on an afternoon flight to Florida? Especially when over $140,000 is at stake? If you're Dog, you 911 the team and race to Honolulu International.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a run away fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team Baby Lyssa decides she will step-up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy. Dog however has the cure--a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy. Dog however has the cure--a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, he's racked up numerous restraining orders over the years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been devastated by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home, loving kids, and an adoring husband for an ice pipe. He busts Mae, but is amazed to discover that her family still showers her with love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down an fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close knit community.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving and today's hunt makes this point crystal clear. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as "The Godfather of Waikiki". The bond is small, Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show. The first case involves Frankie, who's had a problem with methamphetamines.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"--shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds. But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy. Dog however has the cure--a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead.

programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, he's racked up numerous restraining orders over the years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been devastated by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home, loving kids, and an adoring husband for an ice pipe. He busts Mae, but is amazed to discover that her family still showers her with love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down an fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close knit community.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving and today's hunt makes this point crystal clear. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter.

programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show. The first case involves Frankie, who's had a problem with methamphetamines.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"--shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds. But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem on his hands. One of his clients, Owen, has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: As Dog likes to say, "it's not the years it's the miles," and this goes for both men and machines. Those long hunts and the rides to jail take a toll not only on Dog but also on his vehicles.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond because 18-year-old Ginger is selling drugs and running wild.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth designs a luxurious new office for the team and shows it off to Dog, but the bounty hunter is more interested in starting his hunt for Federico, who's been revoked for missing court dates and generally running amuck.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors but instead of hunting for treats they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog always wants to share the wisdom he has collected on the streets with the fugitives he captures. But today he's going to do double duty! His son-in-law Travis (and trainee bondsman) is also in need of some knowledge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The day starts with Duane Lee and Leland facing off in the kind of court rarely associated with the Chapmans...a tennis court. At stake, as always, are bragging rights for which son can claim the title of "Chapman Champ."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way." There are big nuptials planned on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara, and the sudden arrest of Dog, Tim, and Leland.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Victim to Verdict: Movie Popcorn Murder
programme.desc: A Sunday afternoon movie date turns deadly when a confrontation over a cell phone and a bag of popcorn ends with a gunshot. Retired police captain Curtis Reeves claims he acted in self-defense, but will a jury believe that his life was in danger?

programme.title: Victim To Verdict - A Clown At The Door
programme.desc: A clown carrying balloons and a basket of flowers shoots and kills Marlene Warren when she opens her front door in 1990; even though police suspected Warren's ex-husband and his then-girlfriend, it would take decades to make an arrest.

programme.title: Victim To Verdict - Chaos In Kenosha
programme.desc: Kyle Rittenhouse shoots and kills two people and aims a third during a Black Lives Matter protest in Kenosha, Wisconsin; the 17-year-old, armed with an AR-15, claims he acted in self-defense because he feared for his life.

programme.title: Someone They Knew With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Iowa farmer Tom Lyon is excited when a nearby plot of land goes up for sale, but he isn't the only one. When Lyon's body is discovered at the bottom of a well, the trail of blood leads through that very land.

programme.title: Someone They Knew With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: The people of Defiance, Iowa, find it strange when Scott Shanahan disappears, leaving his wife and kids, but Scott is always unpredictable and no one gives it much more thought.

programme.title: Someone They Knew With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Austin, Texas, TV executive Steven Beard is shot as he sleeps; with only a single shotgun shell to go on, police follow a trail from mansions and country clubs to bookstores and hospital psych wards.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The Mutual UFO Network is an organization devoted to the scientific investigation of unidentified aerial phenomena and other unexplained encounters; with more than five decades of investigations, MUFON's extensive database could contain proof.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Strange rock carvings from 8,000 B.C.; unexplained sightings in the new world; a frightening anomaly plaguing the American west; a strange man-made cave filled with ancient objects and mummies; strange lights and unexplained weather anomalies.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The native Hawaiians trace their ancestry to beings from the Pleiades star system called the Akua; a look at these islands and if they once had been inhabited by extraterrestrials.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Exploring why ancient civilizations believed mountains were the homes of gods.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Serpent gods are found in the traditions of Mesopotamia, Central and South America, India, China, Japan and the Bible; a look at if these stories describe a race of reptile-like extraterrestrials instead.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Over 10,000 crop circles, appearing in 50 different countries, have been reported; examining whether they are all part of an elaborate hoax or not.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A look at if ancient aliens could have shaped human evolution by introducing viral epidemics on Earth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.desc: Shocking new evidence reveals that advanced civilizations might have existed on Earth tens of thousands of years ago; is it possible that a technologically advanced society thrived on Earth, and did they leave behind a record.

programme.desc: Discussing whether ancient cultures could have encountered extraterrestrial beings that have achieved eternal life, and discussing the Ancient Astronaut Theorists suggestions.

programme.desc: Stories of strange encounters during major events in history and myths containing gods that intervene in human affairs may be early accounts of alien encounters.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Anchored by Lester Holt, "Dateline" is NBC's signature newsmagazine, bringing viewers storytelling at its best by putting the pieces together to present the full picture of real-life events. programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Kentucky man is convicted of murdering his co-worker; the mystery is considered solved until a stunning disclosure years later turns the closed case upside down.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a mother of five is found dead in her bedroom, her family believes a crazed killer is to blame.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After losing a hotly contested custody battle, a woman disappears with her 11-month-old daughter; the child's father searches four continents for almost two decades before reaching an emotional conclusion.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An advocate for missing and murdered Indigenous women searches for answers in the disappearance of her niece and exposes cracks in law enforcement.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The survivor of a horrible attack is convinced police have the wrong suspect.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The children of an Oklahoma pastor survive the robbery that took their parents' lives and observe the trials of those accused of committing the crime.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Authorities become suspicious when a pastor loses a second wife in an accident.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An investigation of abuse allegations against one of the owners of religious reform school Circle of Hope.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Authorities investigate the killing of a small-town fire chief.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a wife calls 911 to report her husband has been shot on a country road in Texas, officers rush to the scene.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As detectives struggle to find leads in the murder of a college student, the perpetrator strikes again.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mother is found dead in a house fire but an autopsy reveals a brutal murder; the case goes cold for years until a shocking confession is made.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Some of the residents of Midsomer Worthy are trying to prevent James Harrington from turning Setwale Woods into a housing estate. Led by a solicitor, Bernadette Sullivan, and a local farmer, Simon Bartlett, who also happen to be having an affair, they haven't had much success in court. When Bartlett's wife Victoria is found dead in the woods, Barnaby and Troy must first determine is if her murder is related to the planned development or something as yet unknown. The information provided by two inquisitive children, who see the investigation as a fascinating game, proves invaluable in solving the crime.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The double murder of eccentric widow, Isobel Hewitt, and adulterous doctor, Duncan Goff, lead Barnaby and Troy into finding out more about their personal and private lives in the village of Malham Bridge. While Troy suspects an antique dealer that Isobel befriended is the culprit, Barnaby is not convinced, believing anyone the victims knew when they were alive could have been the murderer, from the doctor's wife to the local owner of a restaurant. Even Isobel's close family and members of a local fly fishing group are suspects as they investigate all possible angles.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Martin Wroath is found dead in his home in Midsomer Worthy, Barnaby is unconvinced that he committed suicide with his own shotgun in an unnecessarily complex fashion. When a second murder occurs on an assault course at a local cottage hospital, in which Wroath was a patient, the detective suspects a link between the two murders, and soon finds a wealth of hatred, jealously and lies, before discovering that rope in the village is mysteriously disappearing.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Joyce is taking part in an open-air art class, being held on the village green of Midsomer Florey, when she discovers the body of an elderly fellow student, Ruth Fairfax, concealed beneath some undergrowth shortly after a session. Just as Barnaby begins to learn that Ruth was not all she seemed to be, officers of the NIS pull him off the case. While Troy is allowed to assist them, Barnaby is left handling a local operation into a spate of thefts, yet he decides to continue his investigations in secret. In doing so, he soon turns up armed robbery, unaccounted stolen money, former criminals, and secret liaisons, before discovering that the NIS investigation is not being as thorough as it should be.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: At his family home in Upper Warden, arrogant actor Larry Smith is killed, when a summer house he walks in to as part of a promotion for the sequel to his hit film, The House of Satan, is suddenly destroyed in an explosion. His family quickly fling accusations for his murder directly at the residents of rival village, Lower Warden, leading Barnaby and Troy to determine if this is the case, especially when Larry's director, another member of the family, is electrocuted while using an exercise bike. It's not long before secrets, affairs and blackmail begin to surface from within the two villages.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: Bloomberg Tech is the only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. The program brings the audience interviews from the biggest names in the business, offering in-depth analysis and critical insights.

programme.title: Bloomberg Real Yield
programme.desc: Bloomberg Real Yield, is a weekly fixed-income show driven by Bloomberg data and Wall Street analysis. The program covers sovereign and credit markets as investors grapple with fiscal, monetary and financial factors. Each week guests from major bond companies join us to give their insight and perspective on how to trade the global headlines.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bloomberg Real Yield
programme.desc: Not everyone has a lot of money to invest, which is why Bloomberg has financial indices that are based on fixed income, which is also the focus on this weekly show. The program covers news and trends in the fixed-income market and includes interviews with guests from major financial institutions. "Bloomberg Real Yield" incorporates data and analysis from terminal bond experts to help dive into topics that are moving the bond markets in order to help empower viewers to make knowledgeable financial decisions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: Bloomberg Originals offers bold takes for curious minds on today’s biggest topics. Covering stories you haven’t seen and viewpoints you haven’t heard, you’ll discover cinematic, data-led documentaries that investigate the intersection of business and culture. Exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, Bloomberg Originals is business as you’ve never seen it.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua:Alexander Stubb, President of Finland
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, Bloomberg’s award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas. Discover what inspires them, how they navigate power and the lessons they offer on defining success. Insightful, cinematic and elegantly crafted, Leaders goes beyond the headlines to reveal the human side of leadership.

programme.title: Las viejas del sicario
programme.desc: Una película de acción de narcos.

programme.title: Mariachi gringo
programme.desc: Edward, un apasionado por la música mexicana, se siente atrapado en la rutina de la pequeña ciudad donde reside. Con el propósito de huir de todo, Edward se muda a México para convertirse en un mariachi.

programme.title: Soy de la frontera verde
programme.desc: Don Hugo un poderoso narcotraficante, muere en circunstacias muy extrañas, aunque todo indica que lo envenenaron. Su hija, doña Fernanda Morales, no dejará cabos sueltos y vengará la muerte de su padre encontrando al culpable.

programme.title: Un ángel en peligro
programme.desc: La felicidad de una familia se quiebra cuando secuestran a su hija. Al mismo tiempo, se descubrirá la red de engaños entre su sobrino y su esposa, además de un nexo con un narcotraficante.

programme.title: A ellas les gustan mayores
programme.desc: Ricardo está casado con Miranda, una bella mujer de afortunada posición social. Sin embargo, Ricardo la engaña con una mujer más joven que él.

programme.title: Cigarrito Bañado
programme.desc: Lucio huye de una deuda y de un amigo peligroso. En el camino conoce a Ximena, una mujer que seduce a los hombres y luego les roba el dinero.

programme.title: Cometa
programme.desc: Un chico pierde todas las cosas que lo motivan a vivir. Se ha quedado sin trabajo, casa y familia, pero en su recorrido por las calles se encuentra a Cometa, un perro callejero.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: La tierra prometida
programme.desc: La historia del pueblo hebreo tras la muerte de Moisés cuando, liderados por Josué, tendrán que enfrentarse a distintos reinos para tomar Canaán, la tierra que Dios les prometió.

programme.title: La tierra prometida
programme.desc: La historia del pueblo hebreo tras la muerte de Moisés cuando, liderados por Josué, tendrán que enfrentarse a distintos reinos para tomar Canaán, la tierra que Dios les prometió.

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Song-yi descubre lo que probablemente sucederá si Min-joon se queda en la Tierra. Hwi-kyung y Min-joon intentan obligar a Jae-kyung a entregarse.

programme.title: Génesis
programme.desc: Adaptación de uno de los libros más reconocidos de la Biblia, que aborda la historia del origen de la humanidad, invitando a entender el presente, volviendo al principio de todo. La caída de Lucifer, la vida de Adán y Eva, Noé y el diluvio, y otros.

programme.title: Señora del Destino
programme.desc: María do Carmo es una madre de cinco hijos que triunfó en la vida con mucha lucha y tesón, pero que todavía tendrá una batalla que luchar: obtener el cariño de su hija quien fue secuestrada cuando era una recién nacida.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Melissa quiere una fiesta de té en casa. Serkan le cuenta a Hazim que una niña vio a Besime hablando por teléfono con Sermin. Melissa y Defne beben alcohol.

programme.title: Moisés y los diez mandamientos
programme.desc: La historia de Moisés desde su nacimiento y llegada a manos de la princesa Henutmire hasta llevar a su pueblo a la Tierra Prometida. Su crianza como un verdadero príncipe egipcio junto a su tío Ramsés.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Marisa se sale con la suya y obtiene un supuesto regalo de Leonardo: la joya de Jade; luego se aprovecha para dar de qué hablar a la prensa. Jade cambia de identidad, roba un bolso.

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Song-yi descubre lo que probablemente sucederá si Min-joon se queda en la Tierra. Hwi-kyung y Min-joon intentan obligar a Jae-kyung a entregarse.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Melissa quiere una fiesta de té en casa. Serkan le cuenta a Hazim que una niña vio a Besime hablando por teléfono con Sermin. Melissa y Defne beben alcohol.

programme.title: El Laberinto de Alicia
programme.desc: Rafael y Sofía involucran a Francisco en la misteriosa muerte de Diana. Mateo sabe quién es el Gato, pero no dice nada.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Said le confiesa a Jade que ha tratado de sacarla de su corazón, sin lograrlo. Ella se conmueve, baila la danza del sable y viven una noche de pasión. Lucas se molesta por el collar de Marisa.

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Song-yi insiste en devolver a Min-Joon a su planeta. Cuando va a cenar con la familia de la actriz, la madre de Song-yi descubre que es una extraterrestre.

programme.title: Génesis
programme.desc: Adaptación de uno de los libros más reconocidos de la Biblia, que aborda la historia del origen de la humanidad, invitando a entender el presente, volviendo al principio de todo. La caída de Lucifer, la vida de Adán y Eva, Noé y el diluvio, y otros.

programme.title: Señora del Destino
programme.desc: María do Carmo es una madre de cinco hijos que triunfó en la vida con mucha lucha y tesón, pero que todavía tendrá una batalla que luchar: obtener el cariño de su hija quien fue secuestrada cuando era una recién nacida.

programme.title: Melissa

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Black History Month is an opportunity to highlight the thinkers, artists, and everyday people who helped shape history – but whose stories may not be familiar to all. We meet the grandson of a world-renowned sculptor who made her home right nearby in Framingham, and talk to the Harvard professor whose new book profiles the first Black female federal judge in the United States. Shayna Seymour talks to Ted Reinstein about his new book that highlights the unsung local heroes who helped break Major League Baseball’s color barrier. And we visit Lynn and Cambridge, which are digging more deeply into the history of their Black communities.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: Shift: The Ragbrai Documentary
programme.desc: A celebration of the oldest, largest, and longest recreational touring bicycle ride in the world. Three riders and a pair of community leaders reach new personal heights, changing their lives along the seven day ride across Iowa.

programme.title: WCVB 50 Years Special
programme.desc: (2022) WCVB Channel 5 celebrates 50 years - from the very first moments on the air to meeting the people who make it all happen.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Politics, culture…and community. In honor of National Hispanic Heritage Month, NewsCenter 5’s Nathalie Pozo and Jessica Brown help celebrate the individuals and organizations who help make Massachusetts great. In Chelsea, we meet trailblazing Latinas helping to shape their city’s future as elected and community leaders. We sample traditional Peruvian cuisine at Tambo 22, and reimagined empanadas at Buenas and Super Bien. Also tonight we meet local artists who are making their mark, and a family who came to Massachusetts seeking care for their sick baby -- and found both a community and a surprise calling: beekeeping!

programme.title: FIXT
programme.desc: Andrew returned home from serving his country with a toothache so bad he covers his mouth out of habit. Mickey had forgotten how to smile after years of struggle with addiction and abuse. Will the FIXT team help them smile again?

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: We hit the practice field with the New England Revolution captain Carles Gil and Cranston, R.I., native Damian Rivera. On the food scene, we find Colombian specialties in Lowell and Mexican in Cambridge. And we profile a local party planner, a giant on the fashion scene, as well as longtime journalist and community activist, Jose Massó, a presence on the Boston radio airwaves for nearly 50 years. Tonight, NewsCenter 5’s Jessica Brown, Jennifer Peñate, and Angel Salcedo team up to bring us local stories of achievement in cel

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: As the summer heat sizzles, we’re seeking relief! Tonight it’s a tour of Boston Harbor -- today a draw for boaters, a backdrop for outdoor dining, and a destination for tourists and residents alike. But it took decades, billions, and enormous political will to clean up the harbor and spark its economic potential. We check out the progress (a dog bakery on the Fish Pier!) and problems (flood risk); visit Spectacle Island; and meet a third-generation fisherman still making it on the working waterfront.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Youth sports is a multi-billion dollar industry. Tonight Shayna Seymour talks to players, families, and coaches about the pros – and cons – of the modern approach to youth sports, including private club sports.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Anthony Everett is back with more stories from the shore – lake, ocean, and otherwise.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: WCVB

programme.title: Chronicle: Cheap Eats
programme.desc: It’s always a treat to enjoy a meal prepared by someone else, but money’s tight. So we’re shopping for affordable (and tasty) dining-out options! We find entrees in Chinatown for $13, Lebanese/Armenian specialties in Boston for $11, and noodles in the ’burbs for 10 bucks. After 30 years in business, downtown Boston favorite Chacarero is still slinging sandwiches that can stretch to two meals. We hit Casey’s in Natick, a classic diner offering a $3.75 hot dog. And tune in to find out where you can find a burger, fries, and a beer for just 12 bucks.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: You don’t have to be a beer drinker to appreciate stories of New Englanders who are brewing, crafting, and promoting craft beer amid a changing landscape. We also meet brewers who are committed to reducing their environmental impact, and sample brews for your pooch – well, technically, “brew biscuits” up-cycled from spent grains.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: What ever happened to the “Old Chevy,” you ask? That is one of the most common questions we get at Chronicle. Longtime Chronicle co-anchor Peter Mehegan and his trusty ’69 Chevy logged a lot of miles together in Maine. For those of you who missed those years, and those who miss the Chevy (and Peter), tonight is a look back.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: As the Celtics prep for Game 4 of the NBA Finals we revisit some of Chronicle’s many behind-the-scenes moments with the Green! Shayna Seymour has bowled with Marcus Smart, taken a Duck Tour with Robert Williams, and sat down with (then-rookie) Jayson Tatum - and his mom! We recall the time the whole Chronicle crew took on Garden duties for a day. And back in the glory days of the ‘80s we got an inside look at a Celtics practice. Get pumped up for the playoffs with our trip down Celtics - and Chronicle! - memory lane.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: As the Celtics prep for Game 4 against the Mavericks, Chronicle is getting in on the action! Tonight we meet superfans who positively bleed green, and catch up with a local writer who has penned a Celtics-inspired novel.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight we meet amateurs who investigate unsolved mysteries in their free time, including the librarian who helped solve a four-decade-old New Hampshire mystery based on her online research. We also meet the two civilians who helped uncover the remains of a Billerica teen who disappeared without a trace four decades ago. And if your interests lie outside the “true crime” genre? We meet volunteers who help find missing pets, and city workers who staff Boston’s municipal tip line.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: We packed a lot into our 40th anniversary special but there’s so much more in the vault! Tonight, we dive back into the archives to revisit some truly “classic” moments – from the time the whole crew took shifts at a New England country inn, to an interview with the local couple who dressed alike every day of their married life, to our TWO interviews with Oprah Winfrey. Throw in our visit to a “Dirty-Dancing”-style resort in the Catskills and you have yourself a Classic. Tonight we chronicle more memorable people, places, and adventures we’ve brought you over the years.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: In honor of St. Patrick’s Day (and our 40th anniversary this year) we’re making a virtual “return trip” to the Emerald Isle. Longtime co-anchors Mary Richardson and Peter Mehegan traveled the “Narrow Roads and Back Lanes” several times over the course of two decades, when Ireland experienced significant changes. What hasn’t changed? The raw beauty of the landscape. In tonight’s Classic Chronicle, we’ll take in the scenic lakes of Killarney, Peter’s search for his roots, and Mary’s inspirational visit to Donegal and trip on the River Shannon.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: We’re all about the Bay State “Meds” - Medford, Medway, and Medfield! We visit an Italian restaurant in Medford that’s all about family, and has a different take on a menu (hint: there isn’t one).

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Americans are obsessed with coffee and Nicole Estaphan is brewing up some good stories. She explores the history of coffee in Boston (was it coffee, not tea, that fueled the Revolution?) and meets the coffee trailblazer who founded the late, great Coffee Connection. Nicole learns latte art from the expert baristas at Ogawa in Boston, and if you love beer and coffee, at Marlborough “brew” house Lost Shoe you don’t have to choose! Finally, Nicole talks to a doctor who champions (moderate) coffee consumption.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Americans are obsessed with coffee and Nicole Estaphan is brewing up some stories. She explores the history of coffee in Boston (was it coffee, not tea, that fueled the Revolution?) and meets the trailblazer who founded the late, great Coffee Connection. Nicole learns latte art from the expert baristas at Ogawa in Boston, and if you love beer AND coffee, at Marlborough “brew” house Lost Shoe you don’t have to choose! programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: A local man who claims to have the world’s largest collection of Crocs (shoes, not reptiles). A Montreal man turned Bruins fanatic whose home is bursting with black-and-gold memorabilia. And a photographer who collects… sunsets (we’ll explain). Tonight, we meet New Englanders who just can’t resist the temptation to collect… well, something. They include a local couple making a star turn on their own home renovation show; they invite Anthony Everett into the massive collection of antiques in their barn.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: It influences our moods, our buying habits, and can even determine how hungry we are. We are talking about color! Nicole Estaphan takes us on a journey through the rainbow as we learn how these wavelengths impact our feelings. She takes us to MIT, where a team is working with fabric that can change color whenever you want. From “Tyrion Purple” to “Oregon Blue” - Nicole stops at the Harvard Museum’s Forbes Pigment Collection to learn from some of the oldest varieties on the planet. Finally, have a love for all those holiday light displays? Nicole takes us to the Marshfield Fairgrounds to see how color ties everything together.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight Anthony Everett and Shayna Seymour host an hour packed with gems from Chronicle’s vault, in honor of our 40th anniversary.

programme.title: WCVB 50 Years Special
programme.desc: (2022) WCVB Channel 5 celebrates 50 years - from the very first moments on the air to meeting the people who make it all happen.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Next time someone gives you a hard time about your pandemic diet (or lack thereof), ignore them and Flip the Bird...as in the Beverly restaurant, Flip the Bird, known for its variety of chicken sandwiches. Perhaps you’re a lobster lover or you prefer a plate of pasta for dinner? We’re trying them all tonight, along with spicy hot ramen, savory pies, and to wash it all down, hot Irish coffee.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chicken and dumplings. Shrimp and grits. Mac and cheese. Darryl’s Corner Bar and Kitchen in Roxbury whips up Southern comfort food staples, and we cozy up to the bar at Hunter’s Kitchen and Bar in South Boston. Erika Tarantal carbo-loads with warm, savory English muffins at Vinal Bakery in Somerville, while in Cambridge we indulge in heaps of ramen and Thai home cooking. Plus, we meet a baker in Providence whose pop-up croissant shop draws lines out the door.

programme.title: FIXT
programme.desc: Andrew returned home from serving his country with a toothache so bad he covers his mouth out of habit. Mickey had forgotten how to smile after years of struggle with addiction and abuse. Will the FIXT team help them smile again?

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: As the temperatures drop we are headed out in search of meals that warm our bellies, including warm and comforting Vietnamese noodle soups, hot chocolate, pumpkin gnocchi, and red sauce specialties.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Who says you have to cross state lines to find beautiful Main Streets and Back Roads? After all, there’s plenty to enjoy in our own backyard. Tonight, Anthony Everett heads to Concord, Massachusetts, a town with a rich concentration of history, culture, and natural beauty.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: People who say the Nutmeg State is boring just aren’t looking hard enough. This quiet corner of New England is home to a medieval castle (and its eccentric ruler), and the prized collection of the late “Nut Lady.”

programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: You don’t need your own beach to throw your own clambake! Tonight Shayna Seymour gets advice from local chefs and restaurateurs on prepping summer specialties: Backyard burgers from Bred Gourmet, steamers at Woodman’s of Essex, and super-fancy s’mores from Cambridge’s Urban Hearth. Shayna also meets a retired police chief who’s dishing up pizza in his “golden years.”

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: We still have some summer left to hold onto, and it’s definitely been a “scorch-ah”! We have some ideas if you need to “cool down” a bit. Ted Reinstein visits some of Vermont’s best swimming holes, while Anthony Everett strolls along the pier and sands of Old Orchard Beach in Maine. We sip wine slushies, healthy smoothies, and shaved ice cream (yes, it’s a thing) at local businesses. We also check out a local lake with the longest name on record, and hit a waterfall in a spot many don’t know is right nearby.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Treat yourself to cool desserts! Enjoy ice cream, gelato, slushies and more.

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: New Hampshire’s Lakes Region is a renowned summer playground, but tonight we’re exploring the beauty of the surrounding “Cotton Valley” in springtime. We keep our eyes peeled for the traditional “ice out” and take in a model yacht race on Lake Winnipesaukee. We also meet the couple who saved a historic local home, transforming it into an inn recently named by Travel and Leisure as the number one resort hotel in the U.S. And at Pavilion, a restaurant led by Top Chef alum Chris Viaud, we sample scrumptious seasonal fare.

programme.desc: (2017) Taken from their reservations, thousands of Native American children underwent an education experiment at the Carlisle Indian Industrial School. WGAL News 8's Matt Barcaro documents the Northern Arapaho's historic attempt to reclaim loved ones.

programme.title: The Roller Coaster Wars That Birthed a Beast
programme.desc: In 2006, two dozen roller coaster riders landed in the hospital after a freak malfunction in Ohio. This is the story of Kings Island: how its thrilling – and sometimes nail-biting – history spawned one of America’s greatest amusement parks.
